title: Consumption per DK36/DK19 Industry Code per Hour (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Electricity Consumption per DK36/DK19 Industry Code as specified by Statistics Denmark.
Consumption for Industry Codes includes customers with a CVR number only.

Data is updated with a 9-15 day delay.
Information on the **Industry Codes**, can be found at Statistics Denmark:
* Industry Codes from January 2025 https://www.dst.dk/da/Statistik/dokumentation/nomenklaturer/db  
* Industry Codes until December 2024 https://www.dst.dk/da/Statistik/dokumentation/nomenklaturer/db07 

To comply with laws regarding the protection of private data, **methods for anonymizing data have been applied**. Data may be omitted due to anonymization. This dataset uses number and dominance as a criterion for confidentiality. The number criteria is set to 20 and the dominance criteria is set to 60 percent per hour for 3 hours straight. 
In case of the criteria being exceeded, the dataset will combine data columns or aggregate data columns to a high level in the following order:  
1. DK36 industry codes being combined
2. DK19 industry codes being combined
